name: native-select
description: The one true select: a token-styled wrapper around the real native <select> with a chevron indicator. Submits with a plain form, zero JS, fully accessible for free; value!=label via the content slot, binds via l:model, height-based `size` (sm/md/lg) that aligns to the button + input in a toolbar row. The redundant Lit `select` island was removed (ADR-0012); this covers it.
docs: Copies the native-select partial to your JTE root at lievit/native-select.jte, reached as @template.lievit.native-select(name=...). Pass `options` (value==label) or a `content` slot of <option>/<optgroup> markup (value!=label); the native <select> POSTs under `name` JS-off; bind to a wire field with `model`. `size` (sm=h-8, md=h-10 default, lg=h-12; "default" is a back-compat alias of "md") is height-based so the select lines up flush with a button / input of the matching size in a toolbar. Requires the icon partial for the chevron. The source is yours: edit freely.
